title: Generate Original Data Files
description: When enabled, the original data files will be generated in the output directory

title: Search
description: Specify the font name to search for in the fontFamily attribute. Also used as the font name when replacing font-weight in the same group. More in README.md https://github.com/alma-oss/spirit-design-system/tree/main/exporters/tokens#font-family-replacement

title: Replace
description: Specify the font name that will replace the searched font in the fontFamily attribute.

title: Search font weight
description: When set together with replace font weight, typography tokens using the searched font name with this weight will have their font-weight replaced.

title: Replace font weight
description: The font-weight value that will replace the searched weight when the font name matches.
